## Which step?

Choose the closest match: Step 0 setup, Step 1 basic agent, Step 2 tools, Step 3 MCP, Step 4 toolbox, Step 5 RAG, Step 6 skills, Step 7 multi-agent, Step 8 workflow, Step 9 memory, Step 99 cleanup, or general template feedback.

## What happened?

Describe the bug, confusing instruction, or improvement idea.

## What did you expect?

Tell us what you expected to happen instead.
